title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE QUIRINO MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER FROM THREE HUNDRED FIFTY (350) TO FIVE HUNDRED (500) BEDS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8313, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
109 OG No. 12, 1777 (March 25, 2013); Manila Bulletin, December 12, 2012

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10345, December 04, 2012 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE QUIRINO MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER FROM THREE HUNDRED FIFTY (350) TO FIVE HUNDRED (500) BEDS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8313, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Conress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section 2 of Republic Act No. 8313 is hereby amended to read as follows:

芒聙聹SEC. 2. The bed capacity of the Quirino Memorial Medical Center is hereby increased from three hundred fifty (350) to five hundred (500).芒聙聺

SEC. 2. Section 5 of the same Act is hereby amended to read as follows:

芒聙聹SEC. 5. The Secretary of Health shall immediately include in the Department芒聙聶s programs the implementation of this Act, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.芒聙聺

SEC. 3. Section 6 of the same Act is hereby amended to read as follows:

芒聙聹SEC. 6. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in any newspaper of general circulation.芒聙聺

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 24, 2012 and October 8, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

DEC 04 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
